title: Ultimate Popping Candy Bundle | 24 Pack Fizz Wiz & Tango Variety Box | Includes Every Flavour | Strawberry, Cherry, Apple, Orange & Cola | Vegetarian & Halal Sweets | Letterbox Sized
features: Ultimate Variety Pack: Enjoy a thrilling selection of 24 popping candies with 9 Fizz Wiz and 15 Tango candies in various bold flavors. Perfect for parties, sharing, or satisfying your sweet tooth cravings!
Exciting Flavors: Dive into a burst of cola, strawberry, and cherry Fizz Wiz, along with apple, cherry, and orange Tango for a fun, mouth-popping experience in every bite.
Perfect for All Occasions: These popping candy treats bring excitement to kids and nostalgia to adults alike – an ideal choice for birthdays, party favors, or stocking fillers!
description: Product Description The Ultimate Popping Candy Variety Box Perfect for all occasions! Great for Birthdays, Easter, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Thank You, Father's Day, Get Well Soon, Halloween, Congratulations, Anniversaries, Weddings, Christmas & Many More. What's included? 3 x Fizz Wiz Strawberry Flavour 3 x Fizz Wiz Cherry Flavour 3 x Fizz Wiz Cola Flavour 5 x Tango Orange Flavour 5 x Tango Apple Flavour 5 x Tango Cherry Flavour Ingredients Fizz Wiz Ingredients & Nutritional Info Sugar, lactose ( MILK ), glucose syrup, flavouring, carbon dioxide.
